description_long: This object is a freestanding digital kiosk or information terminal, featuring a rectangular display screen mounted on a sturdy cylindrical pedestal base. The front of the device showcases a colorful graphical interface, likely a touchscreen, displaying data visualizations such as pie charts and labeled categories. The screen is encased in a matte, dark-colored frame with rounded edges, giving it a modern and robust appearance. The pedestal is thick and solid, designed to provide stability, and connects to a wide, circular base that ensures the unit remains upright and secure on flat surfaces. The rear and sides of the object are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing its utilitarian design for public or semi-public environments. This type of device is commonly found in urban settings such as lobbies, transportation hubs, or retail spaces for information dissemination or self-service tasks.
description: A freestanding digital kiosk with a touchscreen display mounted on a sturdy cylindrical pedestal and wide circular base, designed for public information or self-service use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the interactive display screen with colorful data graphics and a matte frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled screen and the thick, cylindrical support connecting to the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back of the screen and the solid pedestal structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled screen and robust support column from the other side.
